_header.file_role: E1 anchor fleet AC baseline config (hand-written, wave 1 scaffold)

metadata.source_note: Meta Llama-3.1-8B (base): 32 dense decoder layers, d_model 4096, GQA (32 Q heads / 8 KV heads, d_head 128), SwiGLU FFN 14336, vocab 128256, RoPE base 500000, RMSNorm eps 1e-5, untied embeddings. Architecture facts: meta-llama/llama-models models/sku_list.py arch_args (dim/n_layers/n_heads/n_kv_heads/vocab/rope_theta/norm_eps) with FFN derived via the official formula in models/llama3/model.py (4*dim -> *2/3 -> *1.3 -> round up to multiple_of 1024 = 14336); cross-checked against the Llama 3 herd paper (arXiv 2407.21783v3, Table 3). FFN derivation, vocab constant and GQA choice all reproduce published values exactly. Unrepresented in schema 0.3: Meta's llama3-type RoPE scaling (factor 8, 8k pretrain -> 128k production context) has no matching scaling.method, so scaling is encoded as none with original_max_position = 8192 (pretrain context); E1 anchor workloads run at <= 2560 tokens so this does not affect predictions. params counts follow AC's parameter ledger (input embedding and lm_head booked separately, 2*vocab*d, plus 2*d_model per layer of RMSNorm); for dense models the ledger books active == total, matching configs/mistral_7b.json conventions.
